title: Bartoline Methylated Spirit 250ml– Multi-Purpose Cleaner & Fuel for Alcohol Burners, Camping Stoves & Glass – Fast-Drying, Smear-Free Hard Surface Cleaner (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
DUAL PURPOSE USE: Ideal as a fuel for alcohol burners, fondues, and camping stoves – reliable and safe for travel or home setups
POWERFUL SURFACE CLEANER: Smear-free cleaner for windows, mirrors, tiles, and other hard surfaces
MULTI-USE UTILITY: Removes stubborn sticker residue, marker ink, grease, and grime from a variety of surfaces
HIGH PURITY FORMULA: Made only from virgin raw materials – never reclaimed or recovered, for professional-grade results
FAST-DRYING & EFFECTIVE: Quick evaporation with no leftover residue – perfect for a polished finish every time
